revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Switzerland%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Switzerland%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{documentation subpage}}
<kbd>Country_data</kbd> templates are also available for each of the twenty-six [[:en:Cantons of Switzerland|Cantons of Switzerland]]:
{| style="background-color:#ecfcf4"
| [[Template:Country data Aargau]] || {{flag|Aargau}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Appenzell Ausserrhoden]] || {{flag|Appenzell Ausserrhoden}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Appenzell Innerrhoden]] || {{flag|Appenzell Innerrhoden}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Basel-Landschaft]] || {{flag|Basel-Landschaft}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Basel-Stadt]] || {{flag|Basel-Stadt}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Bern]] || {{flag|Bern}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Fribourg]] || {{flag|Fribourg}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Geneva]] || {{flag|Geneva}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Glarus]] || {{flag|Glarus}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Graubünden]] || {{flag|Graubünden}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Jura]] || {{flag|Jura}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Lucerne]] || {{flag|Lucerne}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Neuchâtel]] || {{flag|Neuchâtel}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Nidwalden]] || {{flag|Nidwalden}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Obwalden]] || {{flag|Obwalden}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Schaffhausen]] || {{flag|Schaffhausen}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Schwyz]] || {{flag|Schwyz}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Solothurn]] || {{flag|Solothurn}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data St. Gallen]] || {{flag|St. Gallen}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Thurgau]] || {{flag|Thurgau}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Ticino]] || {{flag|Ticino}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Uri]] || {{flag|Uri}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Valais]] || {{flag|Valais}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Vaud]] || {{flag|Vaud}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Zug]] || {{flag|Zug}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Zürich]] || {{flag|Zürich}}
|}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Country data templates of countries|Switzerland]]
[[Category:Country data templates of Switzerland| ]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
